gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor turns slightly toward the class with a big smile and gestures forward as if inviting everyone to join
a person leans in slightly with raised eyebrows, encouragingly tilting their head while looking around the classroom
a tutor stands tall and sweeps one arm across the front while pointing to an imaginary number line in the air
a person moves a hand in an arc from left to right while stepping forward to emphasize the action of adding on the number line
a tutor crouches down slightly, bringing both hands together in front to indicate stacking two blocks and three blocks
a person raises both hands open, palms up, while looking expectantly around the room as if inviting all to count together
a tutor claps hands together cheerfully and gives a thumbs up while beaming widely to celebrate the students' efforts
